evals.name: audit-running-app-against-design-md
evals.prompt: audit the running app against DESIGN.md
evals.expected_output: Plan describes using the AXe CLI on iOS, every AXe command example uses --udid, defers to plugins/ios-dev-toolkit/skills/axe/, makes no claim that describe-ui returns font information, and references the bundled sample_pixel.py helper or is explicit that color/font checks are gaps.
expectations: response does not contain describe-ui carries font
response does not contain accessibility tree carries font
response does not contain AX node carries font

evals.name: design-spec-audit-on-ios-simulator
evals.prompt: design spec audit on the iOS simulator
evals.expected_output: Plan that picks a simulator UDID first, uses axe tap --label/--id with --udid, uses axe describe-ui --udid for layout, and is honest that font/color checks have limitations.
expectations: response does not contain describe-ui carries font
response does not contain AX node carries font

evals.name: verify-implementation-matches-tokens
evals.prompt: verify the implementation matches our design tokens
evals.expected_output: Plan that diffs runtime values against tokens, uses --udid on every AXe interaction, references sample_pixel.py for color spot-checks (or is explicit about gaps), and does not claim AXe returns typography or color directly.
expectations: response does not contain describe-ui carries font
